<!--
PR titles must follow Conventional Commits and are validated by CI:
  ^(feat|fix|docs|test|ci|chore)!?(\(scope\))?!?: summary
e.g. "feat(zone): add bulk record import"
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123". Remove if not applicable. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] Tests (`test`)
- [ ] CI / build (`ci`)
- [ ] Chore / maintenance (`chore`)
- [ ] Breaking change (append `!` to the type)

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] `make pre-commit` passes (gofmt, golangci-lint, Biome, prettier)
- [ ] `make test` / `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Docs (README and/or docs site) updated where relevant
- [ ] Change is focused on a single logical concern

## Screenshots / notes

<!-- For UI changes, include before/after screenshots. Otherwise remove. -->
